name: ocas-sands
description: Calendar management skill. Use when the user wants to view, query, create, modify, or analyze their calendar events. Handles natural-language scheduling, conflict detection with flexibility classification, automatic travel time event insertion between consecutive appointments using Google Places API, and daily schedule briefings for Vesper. Trigger on: 'what's on my calendar', 'schedule a meeting', 'am I free', 'add travel time', 'any conflicts this week', 'what do I need to prepare for tomorrow'. Do not trigger for general time or timezone questions, reminders without calendar context, or task management.
author: Indigo Karasu
